name: Lab Chaos
short_description: Lab Chaos is a fun and challenging indie action platformer game. If you're a casual gamer, a completionist or love to speedrun, Lab Chaos is the game for you.
detailed_description:
Lab Chaos is a fun and challenging indie action platformer game. If you're a casual gamer, a completionist or love to speedrun, Lab Chaos is the game for you.

Help our cute little hero Fleck navigate a vast and dangerous laboratory. Using Fleck’s unique shape-shifting ability, you’ll encounter an innovative variety of obstacles that will send you flipping, floating and flying through each level toward the exit portal. Each level is hand-crafted with original artwork, sound effects and an original soundtrack that will have your toes tapping..

*World 2 is now available!*

Take on the challenge of 26 new levels, much larger and more dangerous than in the original release! We’ve added some new game mechanics along with unique combinations of classic mechanics to discover.

Game Features:
  • 63 hand-crafted levels
  • Physics-based platforming with unique play style
  • A variety of fun challenges and achievements to earn
  • Partial controller support

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian
